assertions.description: INCORRECT: The OPamp-noninverting schematic has R1 (1k) from the inverting input to GND and R2 (9k) from the inverting input to the output — a textbook non-inverting configuration with gain = 1 + R2/R1 = 10. The analyzer classifies it as 'transimpedance_or_buffer' instead of 'non_inverting'. The 'transimpedance_or_buffer' label implies either unity gain (voltage follower) or a transimpedance topology, neither of which applies here.
